violations.text: The sneeze guard at the steam table for upstairs kitchen was observed in poor repair (cracked). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
Two light bulbs under the kitchen hood were nonfunctional during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Gasket and condensate hose for milk cooler downstairs were observed missing. Drainage hole was observed plugged with a rag. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Roasted Sweet Potatoes and Broccoli Salad were observed held at 75 and 58 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were assessed and placed into refrigeration to chill. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: -spray hose at 3 bay sink -eye wash attachments at hand sink -rinse aid cycle of dish machine (affecting equipment and utensils from properly drying) -sneeze guard for upstairs kitchen (cracked). New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

-Wall in dry storage room was observed in poor repair. -Tiled floor observed in poor repair in storage room area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

Chicken Caesar Salad Wraps were observed held at 57 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were assessed and placed into refrigeration during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

Parfaits packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2025
Wood was observed used to hold up handsink basin in 1st floor kitchen. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
Toilet room located in food storage room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

Potatoes, cheeseburgers, were observed held at the oven (oven OFF) at the 2nd service area food items were observed between 92-98 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were reheated at the time of the inspection. Propper instructions for hot hold and reheat items were given to employees. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

Meatball sub, chicken nuggets were observed held at the hot hold unit and cooling rack at the 2nd service area food items were observed between 115-120 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were reheated at the time of the inspection. Propper instructions for hot hold and reheat items were given to employees. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023

Single services of utensils and plates boxes were observed stored on the floor in the 2nd service area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023
The sneeze guard and splash guard at the hot hold buffet warmer at the 2nd kitchen 1. is missing and 2. broken. Equipment was not in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023
The FMC must register with RI Department of Health Center for Food Protection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

Thermometer is lacking in the milk refrigeration unit at the 2nd kitchen. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
The sneeze guard and splash guard at the hot hold buffet warmer at the 2nd kitchen 1. is missing and 2. broken. Equipment was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
